Name: Achilles, the Invincible
Effect: On Enter: Banish an opposing being at this location. If you control a Greek hero at an adjacent location, draw a card.

Name: Odysseus, the Cunning
Effect: On Enter: Move an opposing being to an adjacent location. If that being is banished this turn, draw 2 cards.

Name: Ajax, the Great
Effect: Ongoing: Beings at this location cannot be moved by opponent effects. If this being banishes an opposing being, you may move a Greek hero to this location.

Name: Diomedes, the Fierce
Effect: On Enter: Banish an opposing being with 2 or less Power. If you control Athena, banish an opposing being with 3 or less Power instead.

Name: Patroclus, Achilles' Companion
Effect: On Enter: If Achilles is on the board, this being cannot be banished by opponent effects this turn. If this being is banished, banish an opposing being with 2 or less Power.

Name: Menelaus, King of Sparta
Effect: On Enter: If Helen of Troy is on the board, banish an opposing being at this location. If you do, draw a card.

Name: Nestor, the Wise
Effect: Ongoing: Once per turn, if you control 2+ Greek heroes, draw a card.

Name: Agamemnon, High King
Effect: On Enter: Choose a location. Trojan players cannot play beings at that location this turn.

Name: Greek Blockade Runner
Effect: On Enter: Trojan players cannot draw cards at the start of their next turn. If this being is banished, put a Greek Warrior from your deck into your hand.

Name: Odysseus' Spy
Effect: On Enter: Look at the top 3 cards of an opponents deck. You may banish one of them. If you do, draw a card.

Name: Achilles' Raiding Party
Effect: On Enter: Banish a Trojan ‘supply’ being (e.g., Trojan Granary). If you do, draw a card.

Name: Agamemnon's Command Post
Effect: Ongoing: Trojan players cannot play beings at more than 2 locations. If this being is banished, put a Greek Hero from your deck into your hand.

Name: Nestor's Counselor
Effect: On Enter: Choose a location. Trojan players cannot play beings at that location this turn. If you control 2+ Greek heroes, draw a card.

Name: The Greek Camp
Effect: Ongoing: Greek beings at this location cannot be banished by Trojan effects. Once per turn, you may move a Greek being to an adjacent location.

Name: The Trojan Horse
Effect: On Enter: At the start of your next turn, banish all Trojan beings at this location. If Odysseus is at this location, draw 2 cards instead.
